issues.title: Build command arguments
issues.description: Construct the subprocess argument vector without shell interpolation.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Flags and user values preserve argument boundaries.

issues.title: Validate command argument quoting
issues.description: Exercise subprocess argv construction with spaces and repeated flags.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Each user value remains one argument.

issues.title: Add command palette
issues.description: Open a searchable action menu from the keyboard.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Control K focuses the palette and filters actions.

issues.title: Repair vector cache checksum handling
issues.description: Reject corrupt cache entries and recompute their vectors.
issues.acceptance_criteria: A checksum mismatch never returns a cached vector.

issues.title: Validate cached vector checksums
issues.description: Added checksum validation before reading vector payloads.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Corrupt entries are treated as cache misses.

issues.title: Show cache usage dashboard
issues.description: Display cache hit counts and storage totals in an operator view.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Operators can inspect aggregate cache usage.

issues.title: Review release readiness
issues.description: Inspect docs/release-runbook.md before approving the release.
issues.acceptance_criteria: The existing runbook is reviewed; it is not edited.

issues.title: Rewrite release runbook
issues.description: Edit docs/release-runbook.md to document rollback verification.
issues.acceptance_criteria: The runbook contains the new rollback procedure.
